about:
Falcon View by JLPL (Janta Land Promoters) is a landmark luxury residential address in Sector 66-A, Mohali, set across approximately 34.02 acres at the heart of the Tricity. Designed by world-renowned architect Hafeez Contractor, the project is announced by an iconic falcon-shaped grand entrance — a symbol of strength and freedom — that leads into a community defined by grand architecture and meticulous landscaping.

Known as the green jewel of Tricity, Falcon View devotes 18 acres to lush green landscape, with vehicle-free green walkways and gardens designed to bring residents closer to nature. At its centre sits one of India's biggest clubhouses, spread over 1,50,000 sq ft, with a double-height lobby and an exhaustive suite of indoor and outdoor amenities — from an Olympic-size pool and a 9-hole mini golf arena to squash and badminton courts, a spa, banquet hall and fine-dine restaurant.

The residences range from spacious 3 and 4 BHK apartments to expansive duplex penthouses, each thoughtfully planned with utility/servant accommodation, full-height windows, dry and wet kitchens and 5-star double-height tower lobbies. Strategically positioned minutes from the International Airport, Knowledge City and GMADA IT City, Falcon View pairs premium living with exceptional connectivity.
locationAdv: Just 5 minutes to Shaheed Bhagat Singh International Airport, Mohali

Located on the 200-feet-wide International Airport Road

about:
Galaxy Heights-2 is JLPL's latest high-rise residential address in the coveted Sector 66-A of Mohali, rising adjacent to its predecessor Galaxy Heights and the Sky Gardens community. Designed by internationally renowned architect Hafeez Contractor, it brings together world-class aesthetics, considered specifications and a sense of understated, new-age luxury. Four majestic towers hold 284 thoughtfully planned 2 and 3 BHK apartments, each oriented to capture the best possible views, with ample windows and wide-spread balconies that lend every home a feeling of openness, light and fresh air.

Life here is built around comfort and community. Approximately 40,000 sq.ft. of beautifully landscaped greens wrap the towers, leading to a roughly 5,500 sq.ft. club house with an outdoor swimming pool, gymnasium, spa, reading room and indoor games. Outdoor spaces are equally generous, with an amphitheater, grand lawn, kids' play areas, a box-cricket pitch, an outdoor gym and a multipurpose court. The homes themselves are warm and welcoming - elegant kitchens designed for both beauty and function, cosy bedrooms and inviting living areas finished in quality materials.

Developed by Janta Land Promoters, one of Punjab's pioneering real estate master developers with a track record that includes Falcon View, Sky Gardens and a delivered mega-township of over 400 acres, Galaxy Heights-2 sits within a fully integrated, gated environment backed by 24-hour security, rain water harvesting, solar provisions and dependable power backup. It is an exclusive, luxuriously elegant living space designed to let your happiness ascend to the pinnacle.
locationAdv: Located in Sector 66-A, part of JLPL's Super Mega Mixed-Use Integrated Industrial Park spread across Sectors 66-A, 82 and 83, Mohali
Within JLPL's integrated green destination featuring IT towers, malls, multiplexes, business centres, hotels and healthcare facilities
Adjacent to Galaxy Heights and Sky Gardens residential communities
Set along a 100-foot-wide road for easy connectivity

about:
Noble Callista is an uber-luxury residential address by Noble Ventures, rising at Plot No. 1, Sector 66 Beta within IT City, Mohali. Conceived as a low-density sanctuary at around 55 families per acre, the gated community pairs 18-storied towers built with Mivan brick-less construction technology against 3.5 acres of landscaped parkland, water features and tree-lined walking and cycling tracks.

The residences are spacious 3+1, 4+1 and 5+1 BHK bespoke apartments, each finished with marbled flooring, premium modular kitchens, all-weather hybrid air-conditioning and signature windows that flood the homes with natural light. With only two to four apartments per floor, every home enjoys cross-ventilation, a central-green or hill outlook and a genuine sense of privé living. Each unit also accommodates servant, pooja and store rooms for effortless day-to-day living.

What sets Noble Callista apart is its leisure offering: the first project in the region to feature five club houses, anchored by the Master Club 'Club Royce'. Residents enjoy a half-Olympic swimming pool with a dedicated women's section, a fully-equipped gymnasium, indoor and outdoor sports courts, a spa, a mini cineplex and curated green zones for every age. The Maha-Vastu compliant masterplan, three car parks per home and a 9,000 sq.ft. shopping arcade complete an address designed for effortless 24x7 living.

about:
JLPL Galaxy Heights is a multi-storey freehold residential development that rises in the heart of Sector 66A, Mohali. Spread across 4.12 acres of lush green surroundings, the project brings together six aesthetically designed residential towers, offering world-class 2 BHK apartments crafted for comfortable, contemporary living. Designed by internationally renowned architect Hafeez Contractor, the towers balance privacy, generous space utilisation and resort-style amenities.

Residents enjoy over 40,000 sq.ft. of beautifully landscaped greens, an approximately 6,000 sq.ft. Club House with a swimming pool, and a gated community secured by 24-hour manned perimeter security and electronic surveillance. Earthquake-resistant RCC construction, modular kitchens, rain water harvesting and reliable power backup combine to deliver dependable, urban-ready homes.

Developed by Janta Land Promoters Ltd. (JLPL), an integrated real estate master developer with a proven track record across Mohali and Punjab, Galaxy Heights enjoys a prime, well-connected address - close to the upcoming Chandigarh-Mohali International Airport, Infosys Mohali, the Mohali Railway Station and the Knowledge City institutional belt. It is luxury made affordable, in one of Mohali's most coveted growth corridors.

about:
Hero Homes Mohali, set in Sector 88, is the Phase III chapter of Hero Realty's flagship residential brand — an iconic development where contemporary living blends seamlessly with the serenity of nature. Conceived around the idea of the Parkside Life, the project offers spacious 4 BHK residences framed by lush green landscapes, more than 85% open spaces and uninterrupted views of the Shivalik Hills from every balcony.

The two new towers introduce 172 elevated homes, each 3,490 sq.ft., defined by marble flooring, six-foot-wide balconies, smart door locks, DGU doors and windows, and a modular kitchen with hob and chimney. Residents arrive through a majestic tower entrance into a grand double-height lobby, and enjoy an exclusive 28,934 sq.ft. recreation zone alongside a sprawling 22,500 sq.ft. clubhouse.

Backed by the seven-decade legacy of Hero Enterprise and built to an IGBC Gold standard on a climate-responsive, Vastu-aligned master plan, the community pairs wellness-focused amenities — yoga terrace, business center, senior citizen e-library lounge and abundant sport and play facilities — with strong connectivity to Chandigarh, its airport and the city's key institutions. The result is a rare balance of modern convenience and natural grandeur.

name: Premium Residences

about:
Horizon Belmond is The Horizon Group's flagship luxury residential address in the prime Sector 88 of Mohali, set on the GH2, Sector 88-89 dividing road. Conceived as an ode to the glory of Punjab, the precinct rises as seven exclusive Belmond Towers, each a striking G+24 storey high-rise designed to redefine the city's skyline. With only a cluster of two apartments on every floor, every home is both-side open and green-facing, drenched in natural light and ventilation, and complemented by generous sun decks and uninterrupted views.

At the heart of the offering sits the Koh-i-Noor collection, a limited edition of 5 BHK exclusive duplex residences appointed with personal lifts, double-height living rooms, large sun decks and sophisticated, curated finishes. The interiors carry the signature of acclaimed designer Sussanne Khan, while project execution is overseen by Colliers International, lending the development a rare pedigree of craftsmanship and precision.

Life at Horizon Belmond revolves around Club Stardom, an exclusive indoor club housing an all-weather pool, a fully equipped gymnasium, a library, banquet hall, restaurant and coffee shop, alongside open-air sports courts and lush landscaped greens. A Vastu-compliant plan and sustainable systems such as rainwater harvesting and a sewage treatment plant round out a community designed for elevated, balanced and enduring living.
locationAdv: Located in the prime Sector 88 of Mohali, Punjab's future city

about:
Joy Grand is a premium high-rise residential address by Joy Group, rising in SAS Nagar, Mohali, within the heart of the Tricity. Conceived around the idea of a glorious family legacy, the development offers thoughtfully planned 3 BHK + 1 and 4 BHK + 1 corner residences designed for those who value space, light and refinement in equal measure.

The architecture lets elegance blend with modernity. Sweeping balconies, generous living and dining rooms, serene bedrooms and private elevators come together to create an effortless, contemporary lifestyle. Interiors are finished with premium Italian marble, laminated wooden flooring, modular kitchens and quality fittings, while every detail honours timeless elegance alongside the comforts of the future.

Set within a landscaped, gated community, Joy Grand pairs lush central greens, a swimming pool, recreation lounges and a clubhouse with the connectivity advantages of Mohali. It is positioned as a luxury home crafted for a premier legacy, for families who want their address to tell their story for generations to come.
locationAdv: Located in SAS Nagar, Mohali, part of the Chandigarh Tricity region
Well connected by wide internal and arterial roads
Proximity to Tricity business, retail and education hubs
Convenient access to Chandigarh and Mohali International Airport

about:
The Medallion by Turnstone Realty is a luxury residential address in IT City, Sector 82 Alpha, on Mohali's 200-ft Airport Road. Conceived around the spirit of the Zen Enso, a symbol of strength, elegance and one-mindedness, the development pairs vibrant community living with carefully composed green spaces, including a central green and concept gardens for flowers, herbs, Zen and therapy.

The residences are offered as 3 BHK Mini, 3 BHK + Store and 4 BHK apartments ranging from 1,550 to 2,695 sq.ft of super area. Independent towers rise 22 storeys in an earthquake-resistant Mivan RCC framework, with every flat a corner flat designed for ample sunlight and cross ventilation. Thoughtful touches such as double-height podium parking, a Tri-City first, dedicated tower lobbies with drop-off points and a Vastu-compliant site reflect the developer's customer-centric ethos.

A resort-style amenity programme spans a swimming pool, spa and sauna, gymnasium, terrace lounge, indoor games arcade, co-working spaces and a full suite of sports courts, alongside dedicated zones for children and senior residents. Set minutes from the international airport, the Indian School of Business, Infosys and leading universities, The Medallion places an immaculate living experience at the heart of the city's most thriving neighbourhood.
